issues.problem: Wiki calls OperationTypeId a 'Primary key' but DDL declares it as [int] NULL with a CLUSTERED INDEX, not a PRIMARY KEY constraint. A nullable column cannot be a PK. Should say 'Clustered index key' or 'Logical identifier'.

The 6-category operation taxonomy (Standard Orders, Position Events, Operational, Direct, Limit/Rate, Admin) is presented as fact but is inferred from names with no authoritative classification source. The review-needed sidecar flags this but the wiki does not qualify it.
Point-in-time staleness claim ('Last updated 2026-03-11, ~8 days stale as of 2026-03-19') will rot immediately. Should be removed or reworded.
No explicit Phase Gate Checklist section. Footer says 'Phases: 7/14' without enumerating which phases passed or failed.
Join to Fact_History_Cost marked '(pending)' is speculative — should be confirmed or omitted.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Minor fixes only: (1) Change 'Primary key' in OperationTypeId description to 'Clustered index key / logical identifier' — DDL is nullable with no PK constraint. (2) Qualify the 6-category operation taxonomy as inferred from naming conventions. (3) Remove point-in-time staleness claim. (4) Add explicit Phase Gate Checklist section.

skipped_phases: Phase gate checklist section missing from wiki body
